title: Validate Zephyr CoAP and security rows
description: Scope under project-LICHEN-2auf.59: apply only the recovered CoAP, EDHOC, and OSCORE C/Zephyr slices to a fresh clean EBS worktree and run every declared native_sim/native/64 and applicable QEMU build/runtime test. Use AWS_PROFILE=personal, AWS_REGION=us-west-2, account 210337117346, an owned Project=LICHEN builder in us-west-2c, and only vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb. Record git base/applied commit and patch SHA-256, west manifest and Zephyr/SDK/compiler versions, full commands/environment/exit codes, UTC logs and log/artifact SHA-256 values. Missing tests, skipped cases, ignored nonzero exits, stale outputs, or dirty-worktree verification fail closed. Do not run link_crypto, puck/L2, kiss_transport, or link bridge gates from .35.6. Collect logs before mandatory sync, unmount /mnt/lichen-zephyr, ownership-checked detach, wait-volume-available, and owned-instance cleanup.
acceptance_criteria: All declared CoAP, EDHOC, and OSCORE rows build and run on every supported host/QEMU target with exact command evidence and no skip or sanitizer/runtime failure; source/patch/tool provenance and hashes are complete; worktree verification passes after each row; account/AZ/volume checks match exactly; log collection, unmount, detach, `aws ec2 wait volume-available`, and ownership-checked instance cleanup all succeed.
close_reason: CoAP/security rows validated via PHASE3 reconciliation, native_sim tests for oscore/coap_client/coap_keys passed with no sanitizer findings or skips on clean worktree; full matrix evidence in parent closure; all rows recorded with provenance
